Class ConfigServerProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.config.server.config.ConfigServerProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.cloud.config.server") public class ConfigServerProperties extends Object
Author:
Dave Syer, Roy Clarkson
